subcodes.first_line: O thou who art near to the threshold of grandeur! Before reading thy letter, I pen this reply. The confirmations of the Abhá Kingdom encompass thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقرب درگاه کبریاء مکتوب نخوانده جواب مرقوم میشود تایید ملکوت ابهی شامل و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @poems and quotation from poetry, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
